name: form
title: Form
description: Form composition primitives — z-form-field (wrapper), z-form-control (with errorMessage + helpText), z-form-label (with required indicator), z-form-message (with type variants). Designed to wrap inputs/selects/checkboxes for consistent form structure.

cena.classificationRationale: Pure presentation primitives — wrapper + control + label + message. No state machinery. Composes around inputs/selects/checkboxes (which carry their own Brain via NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR). Pair with input for full form patterns.

preferenceLedgerRows.name: control-flow @if blocks
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: form-control template uses @if/@else for errorMessage vs helpText

cena.convenienceImport: ZardFormImports array in form.imports.ts — bundle pattern for component standalone imports
